characters.name: Amphipods
characters.description: AmphipodsInformationDebutEvery Knight Has Its DayLast AppearanceEvery Knight Has Its DayColorGreenYellowFeaturesWebbed feetLikesWet logsDislikesRocksVoice ActorDaran Norris Amphipodsare a species of frog-likeMixamals. Amphipods very closely resemble real-worldfrogs. Of the two species shown, both have webbed feet, two arms and a general amphibian design. The first species is a light green in tone, with longer legs and yellow highlights on its knees, toes, belly, and head. It also has five teeth and two eyes, with a rounded head. The second species is a darker green in color, with shorter legs, black arms, and more prominent spikes along its back. It also has no teeth, three eyes, and a tail.

characters.name: Aquad
characters.description: AquadInformationDebutNixel, Nixel, Go AwayLast AppearanceNixel, Nixel, Go AwayNicknamesAquod[sic]Doofus(Hydro)TribeMCFDPositionMemberGender PreferenceMaleColorRedYellowLight blueWhiteBlackGreyFeaturesWingsFirefighter helmetPlane rudderPontoonsDislikesNixelsThick smokeQuote"Smoke’s too thick! I’m coming down!"Voice ActorSteve Blum Thick smoke Aquadis anMCFDMixel. The flying extinguisher of the Mixopolis City Fire Department, this Mixel gives the perfect bird’s eye perspective on any emergency. Fly to a water source and open Aquad’s mouth wide to fill up and then soar into the air again to drop water on the fire. When it comes to high-flying combustible action in Mixopolis, Aquad is the go-to inferno-extinguishing Mixel!

characters.name: Balk
characters.description: BalkInformationDebutNixel "Mix Over"Last AppearanceThe Quest for the Lost MixamajigTribeFlexersPositionMemberGender PreferenceMaleColorOrangeBlackGrayFeaturesThree legsFour tentaclesEyestalksMoustacheLikesSlingshot[1]Lunk(best friend)[2]Tap dancingSpinning on his headDislikesNixelsWhen his eyes explodeQuote"You guysare weird. See ya later."Voice ActorBilly WestGame AbilitiesHammer Time (default)Jokester (level 5)Hyper Headbutt (level 10) Balkis aFlexerMixel. Balk is the most scatterbrained member that the Flexers ever have. He is dumb, foolish and idiotic and could be even more stupid than Kraw as he often acts like an immature child that doesn't know any  better. This is a huge result of one of his abilities involving him bashing his head a lot to the point of that it caused him severe brain damage. However he still knows what mixing, maxing and murping are, but he prefers to play rather than show off his smarts to the other Mixels. characters.name: Berp
characters.description: BerpInformationDebutThe Quest for the Lost MixamajigLast AppearanceNixel, Nixel, Go AwayNicknamesWalking food blenderBoy(Gox)Dummy(Gox)TribeMunchosPositionMemberWaiterGender PreferenceMaleColorPurpleLavenderGreyFeaturesLarge mouthFour armsLikesFoodJugglingDislikesNixelsQuote"First,yougot to be worthy. It's just one big juggling act."Voice ActorTom Kenny Berpis aMunchoMixel. Berp is a walking food blender! Although this fast-talker always has somewhere else to be and something else to do, Berp will always find time to eat. Luckily for this greedy Munchos tribe member, those 4 rotating arms are great for juggling lots of food at once and slam-dunking it into his big, opening mouth! Berp is a walking food blender! Although this fast-talker always has somewhere else to be and something else to do, Berp will always find time to eat. Luckily for this greedy Munchos tribe member, those 4 rotating arms are great for juggling lots of food at once and slam-dunking it into his big, opening mouth! He loves to juggle and acts like a bit of a show-off.

characters.name: Blip
characters.description: BlipInformationDebutEvery Knight Has Its DayLast AppearanceNixel, Nixel, Go AwayTribeSpikelsPositionMemberStudentGender PreferenceMaleColorTanGreyBrownFeaturesDog earsLikesThe Nindjas comic booksBoogerScrudZaboNindjasDislikesNixelsQuote“You saved Mixopolis!”Voice ActorTom Kenny Blipis aSpikelMixel. Blip is mostly tan in color. He has a tall semicircle body that acts as his head. A brown stripe is in the middle of his body. He has short grey legs with long tan feet with two square toes on each. He has long arms with black square hands, three tan fingers on each. He has a pair of thick brown lips with a black nose on top of them. He has four teeth sticking downwards. He has two eyes and two thick brown strands of hair on top of his head.

characters.name: Bonflowers
characters.description: BonflowersLevel 1Level 2Level 3InformationAppearancesCalling All MixelsTypeCubit Defense TowerBonflowersare a type of flower seen inCalling All Mixels, used for defendingCubitbases. The first stage of the Bonflower appears to be a bright yellow flower, which appears to be in the middle of growth. It has closed eyes with eyelashes, and a blushing grin underneath. Lava is seen pouring out from the top. Can spew damaging fireballs on yourenemies.

characters.name: Bonzipods
characters.description: BonzipodsInformationDebutEvery Knight Has Its DayLast AppearanceEvery Knight Has Its DayFeaturesMonkey-like faceDiaper-like bottomToe clawsLikesSitting in treesScratching and sniffing their ears Bonzipodsare monkey-likeMixamals. Bonzipods are mostly brown, yellow and cycloptic with a diaper-like bottom. According to one of the students ofMixopolis Middle School, they seem to be the most Mixel-like. Despite the appearance of them, standard monkeys have also been alluded to as well.

characters.name: Booger
characters.description: Booger is a bit snarky in his personality, but very loyal to his close friends. He's a little bit of a coward in fearful situations, but is able to turn around with the right amount of encouragement. He is a bit of a troublemaker and sometimes acts out in class, but will quickly quiet down when scolded.

Boogly is a very pretentious snob. Nothing impresses him, and he claims to other Mixels that he's done everything that there is to do in life. He complains all the time and is very critical. characters.name: Burnard
characters.description: BurnardInformationDebutMixel Moon Madness!Last AppearanceNixel, Nixel, Go AwayNicknamesMix/Murp Monkey(Flamzer)Noxious Mixel(Flamzer)Trooper(Rokit)Cadet(Rokit)Mister(Globert)Good Sir(Niksput)Little Buddy(Niksput)Buddy(Niksput)Planetoid(Orbitons)The Other Chosen One(Himself)TribeInfernitesPositionMemberGender PreferenceMaleColorRedOrangeGreyFeaturesFire breathHornsUnibrowEye RingsLikesLaughingPlaying guitarCupcakesBasketboardDynamiteDislikesNixelsSadnessMurpingQuote"Gotta pull theplug!"Voice ActorJess Harnell Burnardis anInferniteMixel. Burnard finds almost everything hilarious and is very notorious for his habit of constantly laughing all the time 24/7, even through fear or sadness, a trait whichhissiblingsand some other Mixels find a bit (sometimes really) annoying. Ironically, the only way to make him stop laughing is to tell a joke because he does not exactly understand them. He is also very naughty and has a tendency to ignore warnings and prank other Mixels just for his own fun, which can mostly lead to danger for those around him. characters.description: BustoInformationDebutEvery Knight Has Its DayLast AppearanceEvery Knight Has Its DayTribeMCPDPositionMemberJail cellGender PreferenceMaleColorBlueWhiteRedBlackGreyFeaturesJail cell-like bodyHelmetLikesLetting prisoners freeDonutsCoffeeDislikesNixelsQuote"Yes!"Voice ActorChris Cox Bustois anMCPDMixel. This sweet MCPD tribe member is just too nice and will letprisonerstalk their way to freedom. Keep Busto’s jail cell closed or this charming Mixel will get in trouble withKuffs!
